articles.headline: Trial, Triumph, and the Art of the Possible: The Remarkable Story Behind Beethoven’s “Ode to Joy”

articles.headline: Iran’s untraced mines in Strait of Hormuz: Why naval mines are difficult to detect
articles.description: Iran may not be able to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as it cannot locate the mines it laid along the waterway, a New York Times report has said. Indeed, while laying naval mines is easy, detecting and clearing them is a long, painstaking process. Here's why
